Petition For Determination Whether Proposed Actions Are Contests
Off Calendar Nov-21-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Delehunt for Marden Plant (Respondent). Andrew Zabronsky for petitioners.

Parties presented argument regarding Probate Code 21320 and how it applies to the petition. The Court took the matter under submission and will look at the Davies and McIndoe cases.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mizota.
